<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Arch\Support; /** * @internal */ final class FileLineFinder { /** * Gets the line number of the first occurrence of the given callback. * * @param callable(string): bool $callback * @return callable(string): int */ public static function where(callable $callback): callable { return function (string $path) use ($callback): int { if (file_exists($path) === false) { return 0; } $contents = (string) file_get_contents($path); foreach (explode("\n", $contents) as $line => $content) { if ($callback($content)) { return $line + 1; } } return 0; }; } }
